data.title: AMC transferred the majority of its equity in Hycroft Mining to Sprott Mining for $24.1 million.
data.description: In Leawood, Kansas, AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: AMC) has finalized a deal transferring the majority of its equity investment in Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) to Sprott Mining, a Canadian corporation owned by renowned gold and silver investor Eric Sprott. AMC sold around 2.34 million shares of Hycroft common stock in this private transaction.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics granted 18,310 stock options to two individuals under Nasdaq listing rule.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 5, 2025, Nektar Therapeutics revealed that the Organization and Compensation Committee of Nektar's Board of Directors has provided non-qualified stock options for the purchase of a total of 18,310 shares of its common stock to two individuals. This grant was made under the NASDAQ symbol NKTR.

data.title: Webus clarifies partnership expansion with Expedia Group following previous announcement on integration of AI Trip Planner APIs.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in New York, USA, Webus International Limited issued a statement addressing a press release dated October 21, 2025. The release outlined Webus International Limited's plans to enhance Wetour's partnership with Expedia TAAP through the incorporation of Expedia Group's recently introduced AI Trip Planner and APIs. This move signifies a strategic effort by Webus to expand collaboration in leveraging technological advancements within the travel industry.

data.title: Ralph Macchio discusses his journey with Sean Callagy in a podcast; available on Apple Podcasts.
data.description: In a recent interview on Sean Callagy's "Unblinded" podcast, Ralph Macchio, known for his role in the iconic "Karate Kid" movie series, shared insights into his life prior to fame, the production of the groundbreaking film, and the challenges he faced throughout his career. The interview, conducted by Callagy, a renowned speaker and entrepreneur, delves into Macchio's personal journey and the impact of the movie franchise. Listeners can access the full conversation on Apple Podcasts via the podcast link provided.

data.title: Cyclum NextGen Travel Centers partners with Phillips 66 for Snowball Derby, showcasing 76® Renewable Diesel car. Driver Kole Raz to race in the iconic event.
data.description: Cyclum NextGen Travel Centers, based in Pensacola, Florida, is excited to announce its participation in the upcoming Snowball Derby at Five Flags Speedway. The team will be led by driver Kole Raz in the prestigious Super Late Model race, known as one of the most prominent events in the country. The partnership with Phillips 66 will be highlighted through the 76® brand, specifically featuring the 76® Renewable Diesel-branded car. Kole Raz will proudly represent both Cyclum NextGen Travel Centers and Phillips 66 as he competes in this highly competitive short-track racing event.

data.title: CRH, Carvana, and Comfort Systems USA to join S&P 500; Other changes in S&P MidCap 400 and SmallCap 600 on Dec 22.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced adjustments to the S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 indices, to be implemented before the market opens on December 22. These modifications form part of the quarterly rebalance. The changes aim to optimize the performance of the indices and will affect a total of three hundred companies across the three indices.

data.title: AL-S Pharma's Phase 2 study of AP-101 for ALS treatment shows positive results: increased survival, delayed ventilatory support need, functional stabilization, and reduced neurofilament biomarkers. Confirmatory Phase 3 study planned.
data.description: In a recent study conducted in Zurich, Switzerland, participants with elevated misfolded SOD1 showed promising results after 12 months of treatment with AP-101. The primary focus on safety and tolerability was achieved, with evidence of prolonged survival and delayed requirement for ventilatory support. Additionally, there were observations of functional stabilization and reduced levels of neurofilament biomarkers in the study group. These results indicate potential positive outcomes for individuals with this condition.

data.title: Emera renews at-the-market equity program, can issue up to C$600,000,000 of common shares through TSX and NYSE.
data.description: Halifax, Nova Scotia—Emera Incorporated disclosed its renewal of the at-the-market equity program, enabling the Company to issue a maximum of C$600,000,000 worth of common shares from treasury to the public at different prices under the Company's discretion. The Common Shares will be made available for sale through the Toronto Stock Exchange (the “TSX”), and the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Three Bitcoin charts on Binance suggest upcoming significant BTC price movement based on liquidity and trader positions.
data.description: According to data from Binance, there are notable changes in liquidity patterns and trader positions that may impact Bitcoin's future price direction. This information suggests that there could be significant shifts in trader positioning and liquidity that may play a crucial role in determining Bitcoin's next price movement.
